query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  c.incident_description,
  c.incident_type,
  c.reported_cause_label,
  c.incident_location,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.created_at
FROM claims c
WHERE c.incident_description LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR c.incident_description LIKE '%Mandava%'
   OR c.incident_description LIKE '%school%'
   OR c.incident_description LIKE '%School%'
   OR c.incident_location LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR c.incident_location LIKE '%Mandava%'
   OR c.normalised_description LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR c.normalised_description LIKE '%school%'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute 
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  c.incident_description,
  c.incident_type,
  c.reported_cause_label,
  c.incident_location,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.created_at
FROM claims c
WHERE c.incident_description LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR c.incident_description LIKE '%Mandava%'
   OR c.incident_description LIKE '%school%'
   OR c.incident_description LIKE '%School%'
   OR c.incident_location LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR c.incident_location LIKE '%Mandava%'
   OR c.normalised_description LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR c.normalised_description LIKE '%school%'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
